description: You are a Data Warehousing Specialist. Load December 2011 sales data from the staging table `SALES_STAGING_DEC11` into the `P_2011_12` partition of the `SALES_FACT` table using the Exchange Partition technique. Ensure that all data is moved, the staging table is emptied, and all indexes on `SALES_FACT` (including the global index `IDX_SALES_CUSTOMER` and local indexes) remain in a VALID state after the operation. Connection details: user `hr`, password `hr123`, host `localhost`, service `XEPDB1`.
